attributes.action: Do away with the pet health certificate that is only valid for one trip
attributes.additional_details: Change the rules to come in to line with most other countries and dont use this as another tax on the people off the UK basically a holiday tax on people with pets that are looked after and go with them all the time a single trip document is not necessarily as long as all injections and tablets  as recorded and up to date
attributes.background: Issue a pet passport like all other countries that as long as its got all injections and worming tablets up to date it can be used multiple times instead off using dogs going with owners on holiday as a cash cow it isn't right as its never been like this before and we have had no problem in uk

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Seek agreement with the EU to accept pet passports for UK-EU travel" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767906
